query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS warranty_rules (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  brand ENUM('MARKET_SPAS','WELLIS_CLASSIC','WELLIS_LIFE','WELLIS_WIBES','PASSION_SPAS','PLATINUM_SPAS') NOT NULL,
  productLine VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  component VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  warrantyMonths INT NOT NULL,
  coveragePercentage INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  coverageRules TEXT NULL,
  exclusions TEXT NULL,
  warrantyStartType ENUM('PURCHASE_DATE','DELIVERY_DATE') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PURCHASE_DATE',
  notes TEXT NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX wr_brand_idx (brand),
  INDEX wr_component_idx (component),
  INDEX wr_brand_component_idx (brand, component)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS spare_parts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  reference VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NULL,
  category ENUM('PUMPS','ELECTRONICS','JETS','SCREENS','HEATING','PLUMBING','COVERS','CABINETS','LIGHTING','AUDIO','OZONE_UVC','OTHER') NOT NULL,
  priceHT DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  vatRate DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 21.00,
  stockQuantity INT DEFAULT 0,
  lowStockThreshold INT DEFAULT 3,
  imageUrl VARCHAR(512) NULL,
  weight DECIMAL(10,3) NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX sp_reference_idx (reference),
  INDEX sp_category_idx (category)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS spare_parts_compatibility (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sparePartId INT NOT NULL,
  brand ENUM('MARKET_SPAS','WELLIS_CLASSIC','WELLIS_LIFE','WELLIS_WIBES','PASSION_SPAS','PLATINUM_SPAS') NOT NULL,
  productLine VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  modelName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  component VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX spc_sparePartId_idx (sparePartId),
  INDEX spc_brand_idx (brand),
  INDEX spc_component_idx (component)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sav_spare_parts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  serviceId INT NOT NULL,
  sparePartId INT NOT NULL,
  quantity INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  unitPrice DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  isCoveredByWarranty BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  coveragePercentage INT DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX ssp_serviceId_idx (serviceId),
  INDEX ssp_sparePartId_idx (sparePartId)
);

  stockQuantity INT DEFAULT 0,
  lowStockThreshold INT DEFAULT 3,
  imageUrl VARCHAR(512) NULL,
  weight DECIMAL(10,3) NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sparePartId INT NOT NULL,
  brand ENUM('MARKET_SPAS','WELLIS_CLASSIC','WELLIS_LIFE','WELLIS_WIBES','PASSION_SPAS','PLATINUM_SPAS') NOT NULL,

  INDEX spc_sparePartId_idx (sparePartId),

  INDEX spc_component_idx (component)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sav_spare_parts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  serviceId INT NOT NULL,
  sparePartId INT NOT NULL,
  quantity INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  unitPrice DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
